ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MLar', ISBLANK( Release_Forecast__c ), ISBLANK( Release_Date__c) , ( TEXT(External_Case_Category__c)='Claims Handling' ), (TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c )='Claim processing'), (TEXT( External_description__c )='Repair') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is mandatory and must be filled if 'Release Forecast' stays empty.
